content.content: Instagram star and model who is known for posting pictures of herself wearing a variety of different swimwear and lingerie brands to her over 90,000 followers. She can often be seen attending events hosted by Glam and Carpediem. She posted her first picture to Instagram on September 19, 2012. She was featured in an interview on TVN in November of 2014. She was born and raised in Chile. She posted a picture with her mom to Instagram in September of 2012. Other social media stars from Chile includePia Miller,Bramty Juliette, andDaniella Chavez.
